description_long: This is a modern brick bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot, featuring a dark gable roof with skylights and a prominent attached garage. The front facade includes a wide driveway leading to the garage, a paved walkway, and a small covered entryway. The building is primarily constructed from reddish-brown brick with gray accents around the windows, doors, and roof. The property is surrounded by a low brick and metal fence, enclosing a well-maintained grassy yard. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, with additional skylights on the roof for natural lighting. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on accessibility and suburban comfort.
description: A modern brick bungalow with a gable roof, attached garage, and fenced grassy yard. Symmetrical windows and skylights enhance its suburban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, paved driveway, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and the expanse of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, rear windows, and the open grassy area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible roof slope, side wall, and paved walkway leading to the front.
